requirement_topic.en: Radio Equipment Directive — CE Marking & ČTÚ National Enforcement (Czech Republic)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线设备指令 — CE标志及ČTÚ国家执法（捷克共和国）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線設備指令 — CE標誌及ČTÚ國家執法（捷克共和國）

summary.en: Czech Republic is an EU member state and EU Radio Equipment Directive (RED) 2014/53/EU applies in full. CE marking is mandatory for all radio equipment placed on the Czech market. The national competent authority for RED enforcement and spectrum management is ČTÚ (Český telekomunikační úřad — Czech Telecommunication Office), established under zákon č. 127/2005 Sb. (Electronic Communications Act). ČTÚ manages frequency spectrum allocation, type-approval coordination, and RED enforcement for radio and telecom equipment. Market surveillance for product safety is handled jointly with ČOI (Česká obchodní inspekce — Czech Trade Inspection Authority). ÚNMZ (Úřad pro technickou normalizaci, metrologii a státní zkušebnictví — Czech Office for Standards) adopts EU harmonised standards as ČSN EN equivalents. For Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz (IEEE 802.11b/g/n/ax) and Bluetooth, the applicable harmonised standard is EN 300 328 v2.2.2. For 5 GHz Wi-Fi (IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax), EN 301 893 v2.1.1 applies. Compliance with these harmonised standards grants presumption of conformity with RED Art. 3.2. A signed EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) must be available on request from ČTÚ or ČOI. CCC, SRRC, and FCC are not recognised by ČTÚ or ČOI as substitutes for RED/CE.
summary.zh: 捷克共和国是欧盟成员国，欧盟无线设备指令（RED）2014/53/EU在全国全面适用。CE标志是向捷克市场投放所有无线电设备的强制要求。负责RED执法和频谱管理的国家主管机关是ČTÚ（Český telekomunikační úřad——捷克电信局），依据zákon č. 127/2005 Sb.（电子通信法）设立。ČTÚ负责频率频谱分配、型式核准协调以及无线电和电信设备的RED执法。产品安全的市场监管由ČTÚ与ČOI（Česká obchodní inspekce——捷克贸易检查局）共同承担。ÚNMZ（Úřad pro technickou normalizaci, metrologii a státní zkušebnictví——捷克标准局）将欧盟协调标准采纳为ČSN EN等效标准。2.4 GHz Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11b/g/n/ax）和蓝牙适用的协调标准为EN 300 328 v2.2.2；5 GHz Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax）适用EN 301 893 v2.1.1。符合上述协调标准即可推定符合RED第3.2条。须应ČTÚ或ČOI要求提供已签署的欧盟合格声明（DoC）。CCC、SRRC及FCC均不被ČTÚ或ČOI认可为RED/CE的替代认证。
summary.zht: 捷克共和國是歐盟成員國，歐盟無線設備指令（RED）2014/53/EU在全國全面適用。CE標誌是向捷克市場投放所有無線電設備的強制要求。負責RED執法和頻譜管理的國家主管機關是ČTÚ（Český telekomunikační úřad——捷克電信局），依據zákon č. 127/2005 Sb.（電子通信法）設立。ČTÚ負責頻率頻譜分配、型式核准協調以及無線電和電信設備的RED執法。產品安全的市場監管由ČTÚ與ČOI（Česká obchodní inspekce——捷克貿易檢查局）共同承擔。ÚNMZ（Úřad pro technickou normalizaci, metrologii a státní zkušebnictví——捷克標準局）將歐盟協調標準採納為ČSN EN等效標準。2.4 GHz Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11b/g/n/ax）和藍牙適用的協調標準為EN 300 328 v2.2.2；5 GHz Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax）適用EN 301 893 v2.1.1。符合上述協調標準即可推定符合RED第3.2條。須應ČTÚ或ČOI要求提供已簽署的歐盟合格聲明（DoC）。CCC、SRRC及FCC均不被ČTÚ或ČOI認可為RED/CE的替代認證。

standards_or_laws: Zákon č. 127/2005 Sb. o elektronických komunikacích (Electronic Communications Act, Czech Republic) — transposing RED and establishing ČTÚ as national competent authority
EN 300 328 v2.2.2 — Wideband transmission systems; data transmission equipment operating in the 2.4 GHz ISM band (2.4 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth)
EN 301 893 v2.1.1 — 5 GHz RLAN; requirements for harmonised use of 5 GHz spectrum
ČSN EN 300 328 / ČSN EN 301 893 — Czech national adoptions of ETSI harmonised standards (ÚNMZ)

summary.en: In China, wireless transmitters (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth) must obtain SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) Type Approval under the MIIT/NRA framework, administered by the National Radio Administration. The primary domestic technical standards are YD/T 1127 series for 2.4 GHz spread-spectrum devices and GB 15629.11 for Wi-Fi (equivalent to IEEE 802.11). Telecom terminal equipment also requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC is mandatory for IT equipment under CNCA-C17-01. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC satisfies the EU RED Art. 3.2 CE marking pathway enforced by ČTÚ in Czech Republic.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线发射设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙）须依据工业和信息化部/国家无线电管理局（NRA）的监管框架取得SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准。主要国内技术标准为2.4 GHz扩频设备适用的YD/T 1127系列及Wi-Fi设备适用的GB 15629.11（等同IEEE 802.11）。电信终端设备还须取得工信部进网许可证（NAL）。依据CNCA-C17-01，IT设备须强制进行CCC认证。SRRC批准和CCC均不满足ČTÚ在捷克共和国执行的欧盟RED第3.2条CE标志路径要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線發射設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙）須依據工業和信息化部/國家無線電管理局（NRA）的監管框架取得SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准。主要國內技術標準為2.4 GHz擴頻設備適用的YD/T 1127系列及Wi-Fi設備適用的GB 15629.11（等同IEEE 802.11）。電信終端裝置還須取得工信部進網許可證（NAL）。依據CNCA-C17-01，IT設備須強制進行CCC認證。SRRC批准和CCC均不滿足ČTÚ在捷克共和國執行的歐盟RED第3.2條CE標誌路徑要求。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/NRA SRRC Type Approval — mandatory pre-market radio licence for wireless transmitters in China
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — mandatory for telecom terminal equipment sold in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA-C17-01 for IT equipment including Wi-Fi routers and IoT gateways
GB 15629.11 — Information technology; wireless LAN specifications (equivalent to IEEE 802.11)
YD/T 1127 series — Mobile communication terminal radio frequency test methods (MIIT)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC type approval, MIIT NAL, and CCC do not satisfy EU RED Art. 3.2 CE marking requirements enforced by ČTÚ in Czech Republic. Fresh EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 test reports from an EU-accredited (or ILAC MRA-member) test laboratory are required. Key technical gaps: (1) 5 GHz DFS (Dynamic Frequency Selection) requirement under EN 301 893 for channels 52–140 mandatory for RLAN access points in the EU including Czech Republic; (2) EIRP limits under EN 300 328 (100 mW / 20 dBm for 2.4 GHz) must be verified; (3) ETSI measurement methods for channel mask and occupied bandwidth differ from Chinese test protocols. Czech Republic's role as a key Central European logistics and manufacturing hub means ČTÚ and ČOI conduct active market surveillance; non-compliant products are subject to withdrawal and import ban under RED Art. 40.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC型号核准、工信部进网许可证和CCC均不满足ČTÚ在捷克共和国执行的欧盟RED第3.2条CE标志要求。须通过欧盟认可（或ILAC MRA成员）检测实验室重新取得EN 300 328 / EN 301 893检测报告。主要技术差距：（1）EN 301 893对52–140信道的5 GHz动态频率选择（DFS）要求，在包括捷克共和国在内的欧盟范围内对RLAN接入点为强制要求；（2）须核验EN 300 328下的EIRP限值（2.4 GHz为100 mW/20 dBm）；（3）信道掩码及占用带宽的ETSI测量方法与中国测试规程不同。捷克共和国作为中欧重要的物流及制造中心，ČTÚ和ČOI开展积极的市场监管；不合规产品依据RED第40条须予撤市并禁止进口。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC型號核准、工信部進網許可證和CCC均不滿足ČTÚ在捷克共和國執行的歐盟RED第3.2條CE標誌要求。須通過歐盟認可（或ILAC MRA成員）檢測實驗室重新取得EN 300 328 / EN 301 893檢測報告。主要技術差距：（1）EN 301 893對52–140信道的5 GHz動態頻率選擇（DFS）要求，在包括捷克共和國在內的歐盟範圍內對RLAN接入點為強制要求；（2）須核驗EN 300 328下的EIRP限值（2.4 GHz為100 mW/20 dBm）；（3）信道掩碼及佔用頻寬的ETSI測量方法與中國測試規程不同。捷克共和國作為中歐重要的物流及製造中心，ČTÚ和ČOI開展積極的市場監管；不合規產品依據RED第40條須予撤市並禁止進口。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.2; CE marking required before placement on Czech Republic market; enforced by ČTÚ (radio/spectrum) and ČOI (product safety market surveillance)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC Type Approval (NRA/MIIT) + MIIT NAL (telecom terminals) + CCC (IT equipment) required before sale or import in China

source.publisher: ČTÚ — Český telekomunikační úřad (Czech Telecommunication Office)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RED Art. 3.2 radio performance CE marking is the primary mandatory requirement for Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT devices entering Czech Republic. ČTÚ enforces RED nationally; ČOI conducts product market surveillance. SRRC approval, MIIT NAL, and CCC are not recognised substitutes. Fresh EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 test reports from an EU-accredited laboratory and a signed Declaration of Conformity are required before first market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] RED第3.2条无线电性能CE标志是Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备进入捷克共和国的首要强制要求。ČTÚ在全国执行RED；ČOI负责产品市场监管。SRRC批准、工信部进网许可证和CCC均不被认可为替代认证。须在首次市场投放前提供欧盟认可实验室出具的EN 300 328 / EN 301 893检测报告及已签署的合格声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] RED第3.2條無線電性能CE標誌是Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置進入捷克共和國的首要強制要求。ČTÚ在全國執行RED；ČOI負責產品市場監管。SRRC批准、工信部進網許可證和CCC均不被認可為替代認證。須在首次市場投放前提供歐盟認可實驗室出具的EN 300 328 / EN 301 893檢測報告及已簽署的合格聲明。
